name: Fey Gift
description: You can use this trait to take the Help action as a bonus action, and you can do so a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus. You regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest. Starting at 3rd level, choose one of the options below each time you take the Help action with this trait: Hospitality – You and the creature you help each gain a number of temporary hit points equal to 1d6 plus your proficiency bonus. Passage – You and the creature you help each increase your walking speeds by 10 feet until the start of your next turn. Spite – Until the start of your next turn, the first time the creature you help hits a target with an attack roll, that target has disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes within the next minute.

mechanics.trigger: Help action taken with Fey Gift
